title: AdventureChat
description: Analyze texts from players with Adventure API
body:
Analyze texts from players with Adventure API

Supports Rainbow, Hex Colors, Gradients and more!

# Now the chat broadcasting system is under rewriting(switching vanilla broadcast method to AdventureAPI Audiencr), the next version will take some time.

_More via [AdventureAPI Usage](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format.html)_
# Item Show
**By sending "%i" you can show the Item on your hand in chat.**

![ItemShow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/af374008c5948fad22d01725768f2fafc9f908ac.png)
![ItemShow-GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/a5f0905f32331c09da1db822c6cd7c75c13806b0.png)

# InventoryShow
**By sending "&inv" or "[inv]" you can show your Inventory in chat.**

![InventoryShow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/4ab898adabda5b7eba41b208a32b359d0fde33ba.png)
![InventoryShow-GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/af43bb8ef79a33798ec5ea9215530d614704f747.png)

# EnderChestShow
**By sending "%end" or "[end]" you can show your EnderChest in chat.**

![EnderChestShow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/d5e62c10f2f55cc759dab54b0ea5bfa5e3c56bb8.png)
![EnderChestShow-GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zq6arUKB/images/49c15d0a81fbce2fc05bfe25baace5f3cecd6658.png)


More
